use_cases: Displaying travel destinations with background imagery and thematic color overlays
Creating clickable destination cards with hover zoom and glow effects
Building travel booking interfaces with location statistics and flag indicators
Designing destination highlight sections for travel blogs or booking platforms
Featuring location-based content with customizable theme colors via HSL values
ai_summary: A reusable destination card component with customizable HSL theming, background image display, gradient overlays, and interactive hover effects including scale transformations and glow shadows. Designed for travel and location-based content presentation with accessibility support via aria-labels. Uses forwardRef for proper React integration and cn utility for className merging.
